name: Storyboard Pack
description: Turn a story idea or script into numbered scene stills + motion prompts you can batch into any image-to-video tool. Built for long AI family / English-listening story channels.
thumbnail_style: YouTube thumbnail for Easy English family 3D Pixar-lite kids channel: Max (messy black hair, blue polo) and/or Mia (black pigtails, yellow sweater) with huge emotional faces filling the frame, warm soft lighting, one dramatic story moment (shock, tears, apology, or exam fear), oversized bold yellow or white title text with thick outline like Emily Family English / Family Story English packaging, clean 16:9, no watermark, no logos, high click appeal
example_topics: Max made a big mistake before his exams
Mia tried to help but Max would not listen
Result day arrived and Max was afraid to open the door
